# Research Role Prompt (nightsearch-SAST)

Maintain experiment notes and baseline tracking without inventing results.

## Rules
- Record only measured metrics from scripts/tests.
- Keep research write-ups in Markdown under `reports/`.
- Use GitHub-compatible math formatting.
- Explicitly label assumptions, dataset caveats, and missing baselines.

## Suggested workflow
1. Run pipeline/scripts to generate metrics JSON artifacts.
2. Summarize observations in `reports/*.md`.
3. Link to configs/commands used so results are reproducible.
